params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all ACL containers configured for a specific version of a Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Creates a new ACL container for a specific version of a Fastly service. Once the service version is activated, entries within the ACL become versionless and can be updated without requiring a new service version.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

params.name: acl_name
params.description: The name of the ACL.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ACL container for a version of a Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

params.name: acl_name
params.description: The name of the ACL.

items.docs: Updates a specific ACL container for a version of a Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

params.name: acl_name
params.description: The name of the ACL.

items.docs: Deletes a specific ACL container from a version of a Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to retrieve.

params.name: per_page
params.description: The number of items per page.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all entries within a specific ACL. ACL entries are versionless and any updates take effect immediately.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

items.docs: Creates a new entry within a specific ACL. The entry takes effect immediately without requiring a new service version.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

items.docs: Updates multiple ACL entries in a single request. Supports create, update, and delete operations in the same batch. Maximum batch size is 1000 entries.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

params.name: acl_entry_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL entry.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ACL entry.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

params.name: acl_entry_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL entry.

items.docs: Updates a specific ACL entry. The update takes effect immediately without requiring a new service version.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: acl_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

params.name: acl_entry_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL entry.

items.docs: Deletes a specific ACL entry. The deletion takes effect immediately without requiring a new service version.
